{{Quote|I was once buried alive—for 60 years! If that didn't kill me… if the Sith and the Mandalorians and the Bloodboilers of Kragis couldn't kill me—then you will not kill me!|Durge, to Anakin Skywalker|<ref name="Obsession 2">[[Obsession 2|''Obsession'' 2]]</ref>}}
The '''Bloodboilers of Kragis''' was an organization<ref name="Obsession 2" /> from the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region's]] [[Kragis system/Legends|Kragis system]].<ref name="EAOC" /><ref name="Planetnamia" /> At some point by [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]],<ref name="Dates" /> it attempted to [[Death/Legends|kill]] the [[Gen'Dai/Legends|Gen'Dai]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Durge/Legends|Durge]]. Confronted by [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] during the latter's [[mission to Maramere]]<ref name="Obsession 2" /> in 20 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]],<ref name="Dates" /> Durge claimed that as with the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]], and the [[Blood/Legends|Bloodboilers]] of Kragis in the past, Skywalker would not be able to kill him. However, the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] was undeterred, and destroyed Durge by [[Temperature/Legends|disintegrating]] him in the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Karthakk system's sun|Karthakk]].<ref name="Obsession 2" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Bloodboilers of Kragis were mentioned in the [[Obsession 2|second issue]] of the [[Star Wars comic books|comic-book]] ''[[Star Wars: Obsession]]'',<ref name="Obsession 2" /> written by [[W. Haden Blackman|Haden Blackman]] and published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[December 29]], [[2004]].<ref name="DarkHorse">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/10-608/Star-Wars-Obsession-2-of-5|text=Star Wars: Obsession #2 (of 5)}}</ref>
